title: Scratch DB persistence for reviewed live mini-run reports
problem: Tickets 065-067 proved report-only live mini-run and suite repeatability, but operators cannot accumulate reviewed probe evidence locally without re-reading gitignored JSON files. An isolated scratch SQLite path is needed for explicit operator-reviewed metadata only.
acceptance_criteria: probe-persist-reviewed-report requires --confirm-review and writes only to scratch DB.
Default scratch path is data/db/live_probe_scratch.sqlite separate from creative_research.sqlite.
Ordinary probe-mini-run and probe-mini-run-suite do not write any DB by default.
Persisted rows include stage counts, floors_met, fixture_source, contradiction_input_mode, review timestamp.
Invalid or malformed report JSON fails closed with clear errors.
Scratch records are not accepted claims, relationships, or public export inputs.
Safety audit and golden/mock tests pass.
non_goals: Do not fix followup contradiction suite gap.
Do not write to default creative_research.sqlite.
Do not add public export from scratch DB.
Do not auto-persist on mini-run without operator review.
Do not add OpenAI or Qwen ticket authority.
rollback_plan: Revert scratch module, CLI, schema, tests, docs; delete local scratch sqlite file.
